privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic OSCAR EMR patient data. Provider 999998 (Dr. Sarah Chen/oscardoc) is created during environment setup with hardcoded credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. The target appointment is scheduled for 2026-03-20 (Friday, March 20, 2026) from 13:00:00 to 16:00:00 (1:00 PM to 4:00 PM). However, the task description explicitly requires the appointment description to be 'Clinic Strategy Meeting', while the metadata only specifies 'Strategy Meeting' (missing the 'Clinic' prefix). All data is synthetic, generated from seed_patients.sql using Synthea-style synthetic Canadian patient demographics.
